title: Powercut schedule until Sunday announced
body_lines: Three day power cut schedule until Sunday (26) was announced today by the Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL).
The powercut schedule for tomorrow (24) will be for 2½ hours from 12.00 noon to 10.00 pm.
Also 2½ hour powercut for Saturday (26) from 9.30 am to 10.00 pm.
Meanwhile, a Two hour powercut will be imposed on Sunday (26) from 2.00 pm to 10.00 pm.
They said the approval for power shedding was given following a request from the Ceylon Electricity Board (CEB).
The PUCSL regrets the inconvenience caused to its consumers due to prevailing power cuts. (Chaturanga Samarawickrama)
